title: NTSB Investigation Workflow
description: Understand (Bloom L2) the sequence of an aircraft accident investigation from notification to probable-cause determination by clicking each stage of an interactive flowchart.
creator: Forensic Science Intelligent Textbook
subject: Forensic Science
Aviation Crash Forensics
Accident Investigation Process
bloomLevel: Understand (L2) — describe the sequence of an aircraft accident investigation from notification to probable-cause determination.
chapter_title: Aviation Crash Forensics and Aircraft Accident Investigation

educational.topic: The NTSB / ICAO Annex 13 Investigation Process
learningObjectives: Describe the ordered stages of an aircraft accident investigation.
Explain why analysis can loop back to laboratory testing before a probable cause is stated.
educational.prerequisites: Basic idea of an investigation; concept of evidence

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Click-to-reveal: select any stage to read a one- to two-sentence description of what happens there
pedagogical.assessment: Students place the stages in order and explain the re-test feedback loop
pedagogical.modelType: Interactive vertical flowchart with detail panel
controls: Click a stage bar to open its infobox
Click the same stage again to clear the selection
